title: A Rainy Weekend
summary: A teenager describes how she spent a rainy weekend at home, cooking, reading, and watching films with her family.
body: Last weekend the weather was really bad. It rained all day Saturday and most of Sunday, so my family decided to stay at home. In the morning, my mum made a big pot of vegetable soup, and the whole house smelled wonderful. My little brother was bored at first, so I taught him how to play a card game. He was terrible at it, but we laughed a lot. After lunch, I sat on the sofa and read a book I had borrowed from the school library. It was a mystery story, and I could not put it down. By the afternoon, the rain was even heavier, so we pulled the curtains and watched two films together. My dad made popcorn in a saucepan on the stove, which is much better than microwave popcorn. In the evening, we all helped to cook dinner — pasta with tomato sauce and garlic bread. It was simple but really tasty. Before bed, I listened to music and wrote in my diary. I usually get bored when I cannot go outside, but this weekend was different. Sometimes a rainy day at home is exactly what you need.

annotations.exampleEn: It was too cold, so we decided to stay at home.
She made a big pot of vegetable soup for dinner.
At first I was nervous, but then I relaxed.
Do you know how to play any card games?

annotations.meaningVi: không thể bỏ xuống được (vì quá hay)
annotations.exampleEn: The novel was so exciting I couldn't put it down.
It was getting dark so she pulled the curtains.
He heated the soup in a saucepan on the stove.
We ordered pizza and garlic bread.

annotations.meaningVi: đơn giản nhưng thực sự ngon
annotations.exampleEn: The meal was simple but really tasty.
She wrote in her diary every night before bed.

annotations.meaningVi: chính xác là điều bạn cần
annotations.exampleEn: A hot bath is exactly what you need after a long day.

grammarNotes.title: Past simple for completed actions: 'It rained all day'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì quá khứ đơn (động từ chia ở dạng -ed hoặc bất quy tắc) để nói về những hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ. 'It rained all day Saturday' — Trời mưa cả ngày thứ Bảy. 'My mum made soup' — Mẹ tôi nấu súp. Khi kể lại sự việc đã xảy ra vào một thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ (last weekend, yesterday, on Saturday), hãy dùng quá khứ đơn.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the past simple (verb + -ed, or irregular form) to describe completed actions in the past. Examples from the passage: 'It rained all day Saturday', 'My mum made soup', 'I taught him a card game'. When you have a specific past time reference (last weekend, yesterday, on Saturday), the past simple is the correct tense.

grammarNotes.title: 'So' as a result connector: 'It was raining, so we stayed at home'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: 'So' dùng để nối hai mệnh đề, cho thấy kết quả của mệnh đề trước. 'It rained all day, so my family decided to stay at home' — Trời mưa cả ngày, vì vậy gia đình tôi quyết định ở nhà. 'He was bored, so I taught him a card game' — Anh ấy chán, vì vậy tôi dạy anh ấy chơi bài. So luôn đứng ở đầu mệnh đề kết quả, sau dấu phẩy.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'so' to connect two clauses and show that the second is a result of the first. Pattern: [cause], so [result]. Examples: 'It rained all day, so we stayed at home.' / 'He was bored, so I taught him a card game.' 'So' is placed at the start of the result clause, after a comma. It is more informal than 'therefore' but very common in spoken and written English.

translationVi: Cuối tuần trước thời tiết thực sự rất tệ. Trời mưa cả ngày thứ Bảy và hầu hết ngày Chủ nhật, vì vậy gia đình tôi quyết định ở nhà. Buổi sáng, mẹ tôi nấu một nồi súp rau lớn, và cả nhà thơm ngát mùi thức ăn. Lúc đầu em trai tôi chán, nên tôi dạy nó chơi bài. Nó chơi rất tệ, nhưng chúng tôi đã cười rất nhiều. Sau bữa trưa, tôi ngồi trên ghế sofa và đọc một cuốn sách mượn từ thư viện trường. Đó là truyện trinh thám, và tôi không thể bỏ xuống được. Đến chiều, trời mưa còn to hơn, nên chúng tôi kéo rèm lại và xem hai bộ phim cùng nhau. Bố tôi làm bỏng ngô trong nồi trên bếp, ngon hơn bỏng ngô lò vi sóng nhiều. Buổi tối, chúng tôi cùng nhau nấu bữa tối — mì pasta với sốt cà chua và bánh mì bơ tỏi. Đơn giản nhưng thực sự ngon. Trước khi đi ngủ, tôi nghe nhạc và viết nhật ký. Thường thì tôi chán khi không thể ra ngoài, nhưng cuối tuần này khác. Đôi khi một ngày mưa ở nhà chính là điều bạn cần.

questions.prompt: How was the weather last weekend?
questions.explanation: The narrator says 'the weather was really bad. It rained all day Saturday and most of Sunday.'
questions.hint: The narrator describes it in the very first sentence.

questions.prompt: What did the narrator's mum make in the morning?
questions.explanation: The narrator says 'my mum made a big pot of vegetable soup.'
questions.hint: It made the whole house smell wonderful.

questions.prompt: Why was the narrator's brother bored at first?
options: He had no games to play
He did not like the soup
He wanted to go outside but could not
He had already seen the films
questions.explanation: The rain meant the family stayed inside; the brother was bored because of this. The narrator then taught him a card game to help.
questions.hint: The bad weather kept everyone indoors.

questions.prompt: What did the narrator do after lunch?
questions.explanation: 'After lunch, I sat on the sofa and read a book I had borrowed from the school library.'
questions.hint: She borrowed it from the school library.

questions.prompt: What kind of book was the narrator reading?
questions.explanation: 'It was a mystery story, and I could not put it down.'
questions.hint: It was so good she could not stop reading.

questions.prompt: How many films did the family watch?
questions.explanation: 'We pulled the curtains and watched two films together.'
questions.hint: They watched them together in the afternoon.

questions.prompt: How did the dad make the popcorn?
options: In a saucepan on the stove
questions.explanation: 'My dad made popcorn in a saucepan on the stove.'
questions.hint: The narrator says it is better than microwave popcorn.

questions.prompt: What did the family cook for dinner?
options: Pasta with tomato sauce and garlic bread
questions.explanation: 'We all helped to cook dinner — pasta with tomato sauce and garlic bread.'

questions.prompt: What did the narrator do before bed?
options: Listened to music and wrote in her diary
questions.explanation: 'Before bed, I listened to music and wrote in my diary.'
questions.hint: She did two things before sleeping.

questions.prompt: How does the narrator usually feel when she cannot go outside?
questions.explanation: 'I usually get bored when I cannot go outside.'
questions.hint: She says this weekend was different from usual.

questions.prompt: Where had the narrator borrowed her book from?
questions.explanation: 'A book I had borrowed from the school library.'
questions.hint: It is connected to her school.

questions.prompt: What does the narrator say about the dinner?
options: It was simple but really tasty
It took a long time to prepare
questions.hint: She uses a contrast to describe it.

cloze.template: Last weekend the weather was really bad. It {{b1}} all day Saturday and most of Sunday, so my family decided to stay at home. In the morning, my mum made a big {{b2}} of vegetable soup, and the whole house smelled wonderful. My little brother was {{b3}} at first, so I taught him how to play a card game. He was terrible at it, but we laughed a lot. After lunch, I sat on the sofa and read a book I had {{b4}} from the school library. It was a {{b5}} story, and I could not put it down. By the afternoon, the rain was even heavier, so we pulled the {{b6}} and watched two films together. My dad made popcorn in a saucepan on the {{b7}}, which is much better than microwave popcorn. In the evening, we all helped to cook dinner — pasta with tomato {{b8}} and garlic bread. It was simple but really {{b9}}. Before bed, I listened to music and wrote in my {{b10}}.

blanks.explanation: 'rained' — the passage says 'It rained all day Saturday.'
'pot' — a big pot of soup is the standard collocation.
'bored' — the brother was bored because there was nothing to do inside.
'borrowed' — you borrow books from a library.
'mystery' — the passage says 'It was a mystery story.'
'curtains' — they pulled the curtains before watching films.
'stove' — a saucepan is used on the stove.
'sauce' — pasta with tomato sauce is the correct phrase.
'tasty' — the narrator says the meal was 'simple but really tasty.'
'diary' — the passage says 'wrote in my diary.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: The narrator says that a rainy day at home can sometimes be 'exactly what you need.' Do you agree that spending a quiet day indoors with family can be as enjoyable as going out? What activities do you think are most valuable for spending quality time with family, and why?
